visual_description: A man with long hair, wearing a red jacket over a plaid shirt and jeans, walks down a narrow hallway with yellowish wallpaper. He is holding a small axe in his right hand and looks around with a slight smile. The hallway has a door with glass panes on the left and another door on the right.
